subcodes.first_line: O thou who diffusest the fragrances of God! The news of thy safe and protected return hath brought joy to hearts. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات الله خبر رجوع شما محفوظا و مصونا سبب سرور قلوب گردید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @methods of teaching the Cause
